overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a futuristic neon-lit city. The player traverses covered sidewalks, crosses a wet street at a crosswalk, and continues along an urban corridor with digital billboards and reflective wet pavement.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk, passing digital billboards and street furniture

notable_agents.action: woman in white top and dark pants walking toward camera

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement for 'DYNALIFE' on building facade
overhead covering protecting the pedestrian walkway
tall digital display pillar showing rotating advertisements
rain-slicked concrete sidewalk reflecting neon lights
tall palm tree lining the street edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a covered urban sidewalk at night, bathed in neon light from massive digital billboards. The wet pavement reflects the yellow and blue neon glow as the player walks forward, passing a pedestrian walking in the opposite direction.

events.description: exits covered sidewalk and steps onto open street crosswalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the multi-lane street at the yellow striped crosswalk

notable_agents.action: person with distinctive pink boots crossing the street in same direction

entered.detail: broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing lines
tall modern building with illuminated glass facade across the street
open intersection space with visible traffic signals
tall pole with traffic lights and street signs

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the covered walkway onto a wide open intersection, crossing the wet asphalt crosswalk marked with bold yellow stripes. A pedestrian with bright pink boots crosses ahead while the glass facade of a modern office building looms across the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk with bus stops and digital advertising

events.description: reaches opposite sidewalk and enters covered walkway under building overhang

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered sidewalk, passing bus stops and illuminated advertisements

linear red neon light strips embedded in the ceiling
covered bench area with glass panels for public transit waiting
illuminated advertising display integrated with seating
vertical digital display column showing product advertisements

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the street, the player enters a covered walkway beneath a building overhang illuminated by red neon ceiling lights. The sidewalk features bus stop shelters with seated pedestrians and digital advertising pillars displaying bright commercials.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban commercial street with overhead walkways and storefronts

events.description: red sports car drives past on the adjacent street

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk passing various storefronts and street furniture

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving along the street parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: elevated pedestrian walkway or transit bridge spanning across the street ahead
backlit advertisement display with integrated seating
commercial shop windows with illuminated displays
building exterior with distinctive yellow structural trim

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues along the wet urban sidewalk with an overhead bridge structure visible in the distance. The player passes illuminated advertising benches and storefronts before a red sports car drives past on the street. The environment features a mix of exposed sky and building cover with persistent neon lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-drenched futuristic city, moving from a sheltered sidewalk across a wide intersection and back into an urban corridor. It begins under a covered walkway where yellow and blue neon billboards reflect off the wet pavement as the camera passes a lone pedestrian. As the player emerges from the cover, the scene opens onto a wide, rain-slicked intersection with bold yellow crosswalk stripes and a looming glass office building. The camera then shifts back under a building overhang illuminated by red neon ceiling lights, passing bus stop shelters and digital advertising pillars. Finally, the movement continues along the wet sidewalk toward a distant overhead bridge, passing illuminated benches and storefronts just as a red sports car speeds past on the street.
